package rulecoverage

func PositiveFileUploadValidationMixedWithStorageWrite() string {
    ruleID := "file_upload_validation_mixed_with_storage_write"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Functions that validate upload metadata and also persist the upload in the same boundary step."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
